skills.name: himalaya
skills.description: CLI to manage emails via IMAP/SMTP. Use himalaya to list, read, write, reply, forward, search, and organize emails from the terminal. Supports multiple accounts and message composition with MML (MIME Meta Language).

skills.name: dreamai-wenyan-cli
skills.description: Wenyan CLI (@wenyan-md/cli, command wenyan): render Markdown for WeChat Official Account layout and publish to the draft box. Use for WeChat OA drafts, HTML preview, themes, Server-mode or CI. Requires Node/npm; WECHAT_APP_ID and WECHAT_APP_SECRET for publish; IP allowlist or Wenyan Server unless using --server.
